text.title: Blameless Postmortem Facilitation Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for blameless-postmortem-facilitation — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: SEV2 incident → facilitator scheduled (independent) → 5-event timeline reconstructed → 3 factors identified → 2 action items with owner+deadline+verifier → language lint pass → published day 6.

section.title: Final artefact
